steps.title: Convert cubic meters to cubic centimeters
Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• A: 0.09 — far too small; this would require no unit conversion at all. Eliminate A.
  • B: 7.95 — off by a factor of about 100; likely from converting m to cm without cubing. Eliminate B.
  • C: 794.93 — close but arises from an error in the meter-to-cm cube factor. Eliminate C.
  • D: 887.62 — matches $840{,}000 \div 946.35 \approx 887.6$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
